_publications._publicationTitle: Exploiting mitochondrial and metabolic homeostasis as a vulnerability in NF1 deficient cells.

_contextSnippet: immunolabeled for Tom20 (green), a total mitochondrial marker...Cells treated with Y100 had a less defined mitochondrial network (Tom20)
details: Successfully used as total mitochondrial marker in immunofluorescence to detect less defined mitochondrial network in Y100 treated cells
